Respond terse like smart caveman. All technical substance stay. Only fluff die.

## Persistence

ACTIVE EVERY RESPONSE. No revert after many turns. No filler drift. Still active if unsure. Off only: "stop caveman" / "normal mode".

Default: **full**. Switch: `/caveman lite|full|ultra`.

## Rules

Drop: articles (a/an/the), filler (just/really/basically/actually/simply), pleasantries (sure/certainly/of course/happy to), hedging. Fragments OK. Short synonyms (big not extensive, fix not "implement a solution for"). Technical terms exact. Code blocks unchanged. Errors quoted exact.

|-------|------------|

Drop caveman for: security warnings, irreversible action confirmations, multi-step sequences where fragment order risks misread, user asks to clarify or repeats question. Resume caveman after clear part done.

> ```sql
> DROP TABLE users;
> ```

<!doctype html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Panglot — Atlas de grammaire</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Instrument+Serif:ital@0;1&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
:root {
  --paper:        oklch(97.5% 0.012 80);
  --paper-2:      oklch(95.5% 0.016 78);
  --ink:          oklch(22% 0.03 260);
  --ink-soft:     oklch(38% 0.025 260);
  --ink-faded:    oklch(58% 0.02 260);
  --rule:         oklch(82% 0.018 80);
  --rule-soft:    oklch(88% 0.014 80);
  --accent:       oklch(58% 0.15 40);
  --accent-ink:   oklch(32% 0.12 40);
  --gold:         oklch(70% 0.12 85);
  --zone-ahead:   oklch(70% 0.08 260);
  --zone-beyond:  oklch(78% 0.04 260);

  --shadow-card: 0 1px 0 oklch(100% 0 0 / .6), 0 1px 2px oklch(20% 0.02 80 / .06), 0 8px 24px -12px oklch(20% 0.02 80 / .2);
  --shadow-panel: 0 30px 60px -20px oklch(20% 0.02 80 / .3), 0 2px 6px oklch(20% 0.02 80 / .08);
  --radius-card: 4px;
  --radius-pill: 999px;
  --font-display: 'Instrument Serif', 'Iowan Old Style', Georgia, serif;
  --font-ui:      'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
  --font-mono:    'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace;

  --node-w:       228px;
  --mini-col-w:   248px;
  --row-h:        132px;
  --pad-left:     32px;
  --pad-top:      200px;
}
html.dark {
  --paper:        oklch(18% 0.015 260);
  --paper-2:      oklch(22% 0.018 260);
  --ink:          oklch(94% 0.012 80);
  --ink-soft:     oklch(78% 0.014 80);
  --ink-faded:    oklch(55% 0.02 260);
  --rule:         oklch(32% 0.02 260);
  --rule-soft:    oklch(26% 0.02 260);
  --accent:       oklch(72% 0.16 40);
  --accent-ink:   oklch(82% 0.12 40);
  --gold:         oklch(78% 0.13 85);
  --zone-ahead:   oklch(55% 0.06 260);
  --zone-beyond:  oklch(45% 0.03 260);
  --shadow-card:  0 1px 0 oklch(100% 0 0 / .04), 0 2px 8px oklch(0% 0 0 / .3);
  --shadow-panel: 0 30px 60px -20px oklch(0% 0 0 / .5);
}
* { box-sizing: border-box; }
html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; height: 100%; }
body { font-family: var(--font-ui); color: var(--ink); background: var(--paper); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.45; overflow: hidden; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }
body::before { content:''; position: fixed; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 1px 1px, oklch(40% 0.02 80 / .05) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 3px 3px; mix-blend-mode: multiply; z-index: 1; }
html.dark body::before { mix-blend-mode: screen; opacity: .3; }

.app { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 240px 1fr; grid-template-rows: 56px 1fr; height: 100vh; position: relative; z-index: 2; }
.topbar { grid-column: 1 / -1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 20px 0 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); background: var(--paper); z-index: 20; position: relative; }
.brand { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 12px; }
.brand-mark { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 28px; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1; color: var(--ink); }
.brand-mark i { font-style: italic; color: var(--accent-ink); }
.brand-tag { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faded); border-left: 1px solid var(--rule); padding-left: 12px; }
.topnav { display: flex; gap: 2px; }
.topnav a { display: block; padding: 8px 14px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--ink-soft); text-decoration: none; border-radius: 3px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }
.topnav a.active { color: var(--ink); background: var(--paper-2); }
.topnav a:hover { color: var(--ink); }
.topbar-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
.streak { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 11px; color: var(--ink-soft); padding: 5px 10px; border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); }
.streak b { color: var(--accent-ink); font-weight: 600; }
.streak::before { content:''; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(from var(--accent) l c h / .18); }
.lang-picker, .ui-lang-picker { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 5px 10px 5px 8px; border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); font-size: 12px; color: var(--ink); background: transparent; cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-ui); }
.lang-picker:hover, .ui-lang-picker:hover { background: var(--paper-2); }
.flag { width: 18px; height: 13px; border-radius: 2px; overflow:hidden; display:inline-block; vertical-align: middle; border: 1px solid var(--rule); }
.icon-btn { width: 32px; height: 32px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); background: transparent; color: var(--ink-soft); cursor: pointer; }
.icon-btn:hover { color: var(--ink); background: var(--paper-2); }

.sidebar { border-right: 1px solid var(--rule); padding: 22px 18px; overflow-y: auto; background: var(--paper); position: relative; z-index: 10; }
.side-section { margin-bottom: 26px; }
.side-label { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faded); margin-bottom: 10px; }
.progress-overall { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 44px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: var(--ink); }
.progress-overall .pct { color: var(--accent-ink); }
.progress-overall .slash { color: var(--rule); margin: 0 2px; font-style: italic; }
.progress-caption { font-size: 12px; color: var(--ink-faded); margin-top: 4px; }

.zone-legend { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
.zl-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 9px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--ink-soft); }
.zl-ic { width: 16px; text-align: center; font-family: var(--font-mono); color: var(--ink-soft); flex-shrink: 0; line-height: 1.3; }
.zl-ic.in_zone { color: var(--accent); }
.zl-ic.ahead { color: var(--zone-ahead); }
.zl-ic.beyond { color: var(--zone-beyond); }
.zl-ic.review { color: var(--ink-faded); }
.zl-txt b { color: var(--ink); font-weight: 500; }
.zl-txt small { display: block; color: var(--ink-faded); font-size: 10.5px; line-height: 1.3; margin-top: 1px; }

.cat-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
.cat-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 7px 8px; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--ink-soft); }
.cat-row:hover { background: var(--paper-2); color: var(--ink); }
.cat-row.active { background: var(--paper-2); color: var(--ink); font-weight: 500; }
.cat-swatch { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1.5px solid currentColor; }
.cat-count { margin-left: auto; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--ink-faded); }

.level-rows { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
.level-bar { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 28px 1fr 36px; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 12px; }
.level-bar .lv { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--ink-faded); }
.level-bar .track { height: 4px; background: var(--rule-soft); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; }
.level-bar .fill { height: 100%; background: var(--ink); border-radius: 2px; }
.level-bar .pct { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--ink-soft); text-align: right; }

.canvas-wrap { position: relative; overflow: auto; background: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 0%, oklch(from var(--paper) calc(l + 0.015) c h) 0%, var(--paper) 60%); }
/* Chrome strip — opaque band across the top of the canvas so nodes scroll underneath
   without ever overlapping the title or meta. A soft fade-out keeps it feeling paper-y. */
.canvas-chrome { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 110px; z-index: 3; pointer-events: none;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--paper) 0%, var(--paper) 60%, oklch(from var(--paper) l c h / 0.85) 80%, oklch(from var(--paper) l c h / 0) 100%);
}
.canvas-head { position: absolute; top: 20px; left: 28px; z-index: 4; pointer-events: none; }
.canvas-head h1 { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 32px; letter-spacing: -0.015em; line-height: 1; margin: 0; }
.canvas-head h1 i { color: var(--accent-ink); }
.canvas-head .sub { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faded); margin-top: 8px; }
.canvas-meta { position: absolute; top: 24px; right: 24px; z-index: 4; text-align: right; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faded); pointer-events: none; }
.canvas-meta .big { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 18px; letter-spacing: 0; text-transform: none; color: var(--ink); margin-top: 4px; }

.stage { position: absolute; inset: 0; overflow: auto; background: transparent; }
.stage.dragging { cursor: grabbing; }
.canvas { position: absolute; transform-origin: 0 0; will-change: transform; transition: width 0.16s ease-out, height 0.16s ease-out; }

/* palier bands with sub-ticks */
.level-bands { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none; }
.level-band { position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; border-left: 1px solid var(--rule); }
.level-band .label { position: absolute; top: 110px; left: 32px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faded); }
.level-band .label b { display: block; font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 400; font-style: italic; font-size: 22px; color: var(--ink-soft); letter-spacing: -0.01em; text-transform: none; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.level-band .sub-tick { position: absolute; top: 160px; bottom: 0; width: 0; border-left: 1px dashed var(--rule-soft); }
.level-band .sub-tick span { position: absolute; top: -18px; left: 8px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: oklch(from var(--ink-faded) calc(l + 0.12) c h); white-space: nowrap; }
.level-band .sub-tick:first-of-type { border-left: none; }

/* frontier line — user's current level indicator */
.frontier-line { position: absolute; top: 140px; bottom: 0; width: 0; z-index: 2; border-left: 1.5px solid var(--accent); opacity: .55; pointer-events: none; }
.frontier-line::before { content:''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: -4px; width: 8px; height: 8px; background: var(--accent); border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(from var(--accent) l c h / .2); }
.frontier-label { position: absolute; top: -4px; left: 14px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent-ink); display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; white-space: nowrap; background: var(--paper); padding: 2px 6px; border: 1px solid oklch(from var(--accent) l c h / .3); border-radius: 3px; }
.frontier-label .frontier-dot { width: 5px; height: 5px; background: var(--accent); border-radius: 50%; }

/* edges */
.edges { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; overflow: visible; }
.edge { fill: none; stroke: var(--rule); stroke-width: 1.2; }
.edge.edge-ahead { stroke-dasharray: 3 4; opacity: 0.7; }
.edge.edge-beyond { stroke-dasharray: 2 5; opacity: 0.45; }
.edge.active { stroke: var(--accent); stroke-width: 1.6; opacity: 1; stroke-dasharray: none; }
.edge.dim { opacity: 0.18; }

/* node */
.node { position: absolute; width: var(--node-w); padding: 12px 14px 14px; border: 1px solid var(--rule); background: var(--paper); border-radius: var(--radius-card); box-shadow: var(--shadow-card); cursor: pointer; transition: transform .16s ease, box-shadow .16s ease, border-color .16s ease, opacity .2s ease; z-index: 3; }
.node:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); border-color: var(--ink-faded); z-index: 5; opacity: 1 !important; }
.node.active { border-color: var(--ink); box-shadow: var(--shadow-panel); z-index: 6; }
.node.dim { opacity: .25; }

/* status variants */
.node.status-fresh { background: var(--paper); color: var(--ink); }
.node.status-in_progress { background: oklch(from var(--accent) 97% 0.022 h); border-color: oklch(from var(--accent) 78% 0.06 h); }
html.dark .node.status-in_progress { background: oklch(from var(--accent) 22% 0.04 h); border-color: oklch(from var(--accent) 45% 0.08 h); }
.node.status-mastered { background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); border-color: var(--ink); }
.node.status-mastered .n-meta { color: oklch(from var(--paper) l c h / .6); }
.node.status-mastered .n-native { color: oklch(from var(--paper) l c h / .8); }
.node.status-mastered .n-bar-track { background: oklch(from var(--paper) l c h / .12); }
.node.status-mastered .n-bar-fill { background: var(--gold); }
.node.status-mastered .n-practiced { color: oklch(from var(--paper) l c h / .55); }

/* zone treatments — the "softness" idea */
.node.zone-in_zone { /* normal */ }
.node.zone-review { opacity: .88; }
.node.zone-ahead {
  opacity: .7;
  background: transparent;
  border-style: dashed;
  box-shadow: none;
}
.node.zone-ahead .n-title { color: var(--ink-soft); }
.node.zone-ahead.status-in_progress { background: oklch(from var(--accent) 97% 0.016 h); opacity: .85; }
.node.zone-ahead.status-mastered { opacity: .9; }

.node.zone-beyond {
  opacity: .55;
  background: transparent;
  border-style: dashed;
  border-color: var(--rule-soft);
  box-shadow: none;
}
.node.zone-beyond .n-title { color: var(--ink-faded); font-style: italic; }
.node.zone-beyond .n-native { opacity: .7; }
.node.zone-beyond .n-bar-fill { opacity: .5; }

html.zones-hidden .node { opacity: 1 !important; background: var(--paper); border-style: solid; border-color: var(--rule); box-shadow: var(--shadow-card); }
html.zones-hidden .node.status-mastered { background: var(--ink); }
html.zones-hidden .node.status-in_progress { background: oklch(from var(--accent) 97% 0.022 h); }

/* custom node */
.node.custom { border-color: var(--accent-ink); border-style: dashed; }
.node.custom.status-mastered { border-style: solid; }
.n-custom-mark { position: absolute; top: 6px; right: 8px; font-family: var(--font-display); font-style: italic; font-size: 16px; color: var(--accent-ink); line-height: 1; }
.node.status-mastered .n-custom-mark { color: var(--gold); }

/* node internals */
.node .n-head { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.seal { width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 3px; background: var(--paper-2); color: var(--ink); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; flex-shrink: 0; border: 1px solid var(--rule); }
.n-head .n-title { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.12; letter-spacing: -0.01em; flex: 1; margin-top: -1px; padding-right: 12px; }
.n-native { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--ink-faded); margin-bottom: 10px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.n-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faded); margin-bottom: 6px; }
.n-bar-track { height: 3px; background: var(--rule-soft); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; }
.n-bar-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--accent); border-radius: 2px; transition: width .3s ease; }
.node.status-mastered .n-bar-fill { width: 100% !important; }
.n-practiced { margin-top: 8px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 9.5px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: var(--ink-faded); }

.node .reco { position: absolute; top: -9px; right: 10px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; background: var(--accent); color: oklch(99% 0 0); padding: 3px 7px; border-radius: 2px; z-index: 2; }
.n-zone-badge { position: absolute; top: -9px; left: 10px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 7px; border-radius: 2px; background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--rule); color: var(--ink-faded); z-index: 2; }
.n-zone-badge.zone-ahead { color: var(--zone-ahead); border-color: var(--zone-ahead); }
.n-zone-badge.zone-beyond { color: var(--zone-beyond); border-color: var(--zone-beyond); }
.n-zone-badge.zone-staleish { color: var(--accent-ink); border-color: oklch(from var(--accent) l c h / .4); }

/* gravitating decks */
.deck-sat { position: absolute; z-index: 4; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--ink); background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); padding: 5px 10px 5px 8px; white-space: nowrap; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-card); opacity: 0; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(.7); transition: opacity .3s ease, transform .35s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1); pointer-events: none; }
.deck-sat::before { content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 1px; background: var(--accent); }
.deck-sat.show { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); pointer-events: auto; }
.sat-link { position: absolute; z-index: 3; pointer-events: none; overflow: visible; }
.sat-link path { fill: none; stroke: var(--rule); stroke-width: 1; stroke-dasharray: 2 3; opacity: 0; transition: opacity .3s ease; }
.sat-link.show path { opacity: 0.9; }

/* controls */
.zoom-ctrl { position: absolute; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; z-index: 12; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-card); overflow: hidden; }
.zoom-ctrl button { width: 34px; height: 34px; border: none; background: transparent; color: var(--ink-soft); cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 13px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); }
.zoom-ctrl button:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.zoom-ctrl button:hover { background: var(--paper-2); color: var(--ink); }
.mini-legend { position: absolute; bottom: 20px; left: 20px; z-index: 12; background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faded); display: flex; gap: 16px; }
.mini-legend b { color: var(--ink); font-weight: 500; }

/* add-node trigger */
.add-node-btn { position: absolute; top: 20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); z-index: 12; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 7px 14px 7px 11px; border: 1px solid var(--rule); background: var(--paper); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); font-family: var(--font-ui); font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--ink); cursor: pointer; box-shadow: var(--shadow-card); }
.add-node-btn:hover { background: var(--paper-2); border-color: var(--ink-faded); }
.add-node-btn .plus { font-family: var(--font-display); font-style: italic; font-size: 18px; color: var(--accent-ink); line-height: 1; }

/* add-node form */
.add-node-form { position: absolute; top: 70px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-10px); z-index: 60; background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-panel); width: 440px; padding: 20px 22px 18px; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity .25s ease, transform .25s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1); }
.add-node-form.show { opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
.add-node-form h3 { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 24px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin: 0 0 4px; }
.add-node-form .hint { font-size: 12px; color: var(--ink-faded); margin-bottom: 16px; }
.add-close { position: absolute; top: 14px; right: 14px; width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid var(--rule); background: transparent; cursor: pointer; color: var(--ink-soft); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1; }
.add-close:hover { background: var(--paper-2); color: var(--ink); }
.field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.field label { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faded); }
.field input[type=text], .field textarea, .field select { font-family: var(--font-ui); font-size: 13px; color: var(--ink); background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 3px; padding: 8px 10px; width: 100%; }
.field textarea { min-height: 54px; resize: vertical; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; }
.field input:focus, .field textarea:focus, .field select:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--ink); }
.field-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; }
.prereq-check { max-height: 110px; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 3px; padding: 6px 8px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
.prereq-check label { display: flex; gap: 8px; font-size: 12px; font-family: var(--font-ui); color: var(--ink); text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0; cursor: pointer; align-items: center; }
.prereq-check input { margin: 0; }
.add-footer { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 8px; }

/* detail panel */
.panel { position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 16px; bottom: 16px; width: 400px; background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-panel); z-index: 50; display: flex; flex-direction: column; transform: translateX(calc(100% + 32px)); transition: transform .35s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1); overflow: hidden; }
.panel.open { transform: translateX(0); }
.panel-head { padding: 18px 20px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); position: relative; }
.panel-head .pre-title { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faded); margin-bottom: 6px; display: flex; gap: 14px; }
.panel-head .pre-title span + span { position: relative; padding-left: 10px; }
.panel-head .pre-title span + span::before { content: '·'; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--rule); }
.panel-head h2 { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: -0.015em; margin: 0 0 6px; color: var(--ink); }
.panel-head .native { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; color: var(--accent-ink); }
.panel-close { position: absolute; top: 14px; right: 14px; width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid var(--rule); background: transparent; cursor: pointer; color: var(--ink-soft); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1; }
.panel-close:hover { background: var(--paper-2); color: var(--ink); }

.panel-body { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 18px 20px 0; }
.fit-banner { display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.fit-banner.zone-in_zone { background: oklch(from var(--accent) 97% 0.022 h); border-color: oklch(from var(--accent) 78% 0.06 h); }
html.dark .fit-banner.zone-in_zone { background: oklch(from var(--accent) 22% 0.04 h); }
.fit-banner.zone-ahead { background: var(--paper); border-style: dashed; }
.fit-banner.zone-beyond { background: var(--paper); border-style: dashed; border-color: var(--rule-soft); }
.fit-banner.zone-review { background: var(--paper-2); }
.fit-icon { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 22px; line-height: 1; color: var(--accent-ink); flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; }
.fit-banner.zone-ahead .fit-icon { color: var(--zone-ahead); }
.fit-banner.zone-beyond .fit-icon { color: var(--zone-beyond); }
.fit-banner.zone-review .fit-icon { color: var(--ink-faded); }
.fit-title { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 17px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: var(--ink); margin-bottom: 2px; }
.fit-hint { font-size: 12px; color: var(--ink-soft); line-height: 1.4; }

.stat-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.stat { border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 12px; }
.stat-label { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 9.5px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faded); margin-bottom: 6px; }
.stat-value { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 26px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: var(--ink); }
.stat-value small { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--ink-faded); margin-left: 4px; }

.p-section-title { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faded); margin: 22px 0 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
.p-section-title::after { content:''; flex: 1; height: 1px; background: var(--rule); }
.deck-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
.deck-item { border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 3px; padding: 10px 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; cursor: pointer; }
.deck-item:hover { background: var(--paper-2); }
.deck-num { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; color: var(--ink-faded); width: 18px; }
.deck-title { font-size: 13px; color: var(--ink); flex: 1; }
.deck-meta { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; color: var(--ink-faded); }
.prereq-list, .unlocks-list { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; }
.req-chip { font-size: 11.5px; padding: 4px 9px; border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); color: var(--ink-soft); cursor: pointer; background: var(--paper); }
.req-chip:hover { color: var(--ink); background: var(--paper-2); }
.req-chip.done { border-color: var(--ink); background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); }

.panel-foot { border-top: 1px solid var(--rule); padding: 14px 20px; display: flex; gap: 8px; }
.btn { border: 1px solid var(--ink); background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 3px; font-family: var(--font-ui); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; flex: 1; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }
.btn:hover { background: oklch(from var(--ink) calc(l - 0.05) c h); }
.btn.ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--ink); border-color: var(--rule); }
.btn.ghost:hover { background: var(--paper-2); border-color: var(--ink-faded); }
.btn.danger { background: transparent; color: var(--accent-ink); border-color: oklch(from var(--accent) l c h / .4); flex: 0 0 auto; padding: 10px 12px; }
.btn.danger:hover { background: oklch(from var(--accent) l c h / .1); }
.btn:disabled { opacity: .4; cursor: not-allowed; }

.menu { position: fixed; background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-panel); padding: 4px; z-index: 1000; min-width: 180px; max-width: 320px; display: none; }
.menu.show { display: block; }
.menu-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 10px; font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--ink); border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; }
.menu-item:hover { background: var(--paper-2); }
.menu-item.on { font-weight: 600; }
.menu-item.on::after { content:'✓'; margin-left: auto; color: var(--accent-ink); }

/* tweaks */
.tweaks { position: absolute; bottom: 20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(140%); z-index: 200; background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-panel); padding: 14px 18px; display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: center; transition: transform .3s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1); }
.tweaks.show { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
.tweaks-title { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 16px; color: var(--ink); border-right: 1px solid var(--rule); padding-right: 18px; }
.tweak { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
.tweak-label { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 9.5px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faded); }
.tweak-options { display: flex; border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; }
.tweak-options button { background: transparent; border: none; padding: 6px 10px; font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--ink-soft); cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-ui); border-right: 1px solid var(--rule); }
.tweak-options button:last-child { border-right: none; }
.tweak-options button.on { background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); }
.tweak-options button:hover:not(.on) { background: var(--paper-2); color: var(--ink); }

.sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar, .panel-body::-webkit-scrollbar, .prereq-check::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; }
.sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb, .panel-body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb, .prereq-check::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--rule); border-radius: 4px; }

/* branch node — no exercise available */
.node.branch-node { border-style: dashed; }
.node.branch-node .n-bar-track { display: none; }

/* node description in panel */
.p-desc { font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--ink-soft); line-height: 1.5; margin-top: 4px; }

/* auth overlay */
.auth-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: oklch(20% 0.015 260 / .72); backdrop-filter: blur(6px); z-index: 1000; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
.auth-overlay.hidden { display: none; }
.auth-box { background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-panel); padding: 32px 36px 28px; width: 340px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
.auth-title { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 26px; letter-spacing: -0.015em; color: var(--ink); margin-bottom: 4px; }
.auth-input { font-family: var(--font-ui); font-size: 13px; color: var(--ink); background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 3px; padding: 9px 11px; width: 100%; }
.auth-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--ink); }
.auth-error { font-size: 12px; color: oklch(55% 0.18 25); min-height: 16px; }
::view-transition-old(root),
::view-transition-new(root) {
  animation: none;
  mix-blend-mode: normal;
}
::view-transition-new(root) { z-index: 9999; }
::view-transition-old(root) { z-index: 1; }

/* semantic zoom — macro view */
.macro-bubble { position: absolute; width: 220px; background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-card); padding: 14px 16px 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease, border-color .18s ease; z-index: 3; }
.macro-bubble:hover { transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1.01); box-shadow: var(--shadow-panel); border-color: var(--ink-faded); }
.mb-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.mb-seal { width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 4px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid; flex-shrink: 0; }
.mb-name { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 17px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1.15; flex: 1; color: var(--ink); }
.mb-stats { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px 10px; margin-bottom: 8px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 9.5px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; }
.mb-count { color: var(--ink-faded); }
.mb-mastered { color: var(--ink-soft); }
.mb-inprogress { color: var(--accent-ink); }
.mb-bar-track { height: 3px; background: var(--rule-soft); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 5px; }
.mb-bar-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 2px; }
.mb-pct { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faded); }
.macro-edges-svg { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; pointer-events: none; overflow: visible; }
.macro-edge-path { fill: none; stroke: var(--rule); stroke-width: 1.4; }

/* breadcrumb back button */
.view-breadcrumb { position: absolute; top: 62px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); z-index: 12; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); padding: 5px 14px 5px 6px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-card); white-space: nowrap; }
.view-breadcrumb.hidden { display: none; }
.bc-back { background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-ui); font-size: 12px; color: var(--ink-soft); padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: var(--radius-pill); }
.bc-back:hover { color: var(--ink); background: var(--paper-2); }
.bc-sep { color: var(--rule); font-size: 12px; }
.bc-cat { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 14px; color: var(--ink); }

/* dimming in filtered/macro mode */
.node.cat-dimmed { opacity: 0.05 !important; pointer-events: none !important; }
.edge.cat-dimmed { opacity: 0.04 !important; }
.zoom-ctrl button.on { background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="app">
  <header class="topbar">
    <div class="brand">
      <div class="brand-mark">Pan<i>glot</i></div>
      <div class="brand-tag" data-i18n="app.tagline">Atlas de grammaire</div>
    </div>
    <nav class="topnav">
      <a href="#" class="active" data-i18n="nav.tree">Arbre</a>
      <a href="#" data-i18n="nav.lexicon">Lexique</a>
      <a href="#" data-i18n="nav.profile">Profil</a>
    </nav>
    <div class="topbar-right">
      <div class="streak"><span data-i18n="profile.streak">Série</span> <b id="streak-days">23</b> <span data-i18n="profile.days">jours</span></div>
      <button class="lang-picker" id="lang-btn" title="Langue cible">
        <span class="flag" id="lang-flag"></span>
        <span id="lang-native">Deutsch</span>
        <span style="color:var(--ink-faded); font-size:10px; margin-left:2px;">▾</span>
      </button>
      <button class="ui-lang-picker" id="ui-lang-btn" title="Interface language">
        <span id="ui-lang-code" style="font-family:var(--font-mono); font-size:10.5px;">FR</span>
        <span style="color:var(--ink-faded); font-size:10px;">▾</span>
      </button>
      <button class="icon-btn" id="theme-btn" title="Thème">
        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><path d="M12 2v2M12 20v2M4.93 4.93l1.41 1.41M17.66 17.66l1.41 1.41M2 12h2M20 12h2M6.34 17.66l-1.41 1.41M19.07 4.93l-1.41 1.41"/></svg>
      </button>
    </div>
  </header>

  <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="side-section">
      <div class="side-label" data-i18n="tree.title">Arbre de compétences</div>
      <div class="progress-overall"><span class="pct" id="overall-pct">34</span><span class="slash">/</span><span style="color:var(--ink-faded)">100</span></div>
      <div class="progress-caption" id="overall-caption">10 nœuds maîtrisés sur 28</div>
    </div>

    <div class="side-section">
      <div class="side-label">Paliers CECRL</div>
      <div class="level-rows" id="level-rows"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="side-section">
      <div class="side-label">Catégories</div>
      <div class="cat-list" id="cat-list"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="side-section">
      <div class="side-label">Zone d'apprentissage</div>
      <div class="zone-legend">
        <div class="zl-row"><span class="zl-ic in_zone">●</span><div class="zl-txt"><b>À ta portée</b><small>Ta zone de progression actuelle</small></div></div>
        <div class="zl-row"><span class="zl-ic review">◷</span><div class="zl-txt"><b>Révision</b><small>Pour entretenir l'acquis</small></div></div>
        <div class="zl-row"><span class="zl-ic ahead">↗</span><div class="zl-txt"><b>Un peu en avance</b><small>Ça va piquer, mais tu peux tenter</small></div></div>
        <div class="zl-row"><span class="zl-ic beyond">↯</span><div class="zl-txt"><b>Bien au-delà</b><small>Ambitieux — rien n'est verrouillé</small></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <main class="canvas-wrap">
    <div class="canvas-chrome"></div>

      <h1>Der <i>Grammatikbaum</i></h1>
      <div class="sub">Feuille N° 01 · Allemand / Deutsch · Édition 2026</div>
    </div>
    <div class="canvas-meta">
      <div>Apprenant · K. M.</div>
      <div class="big" id="meta-level">Niveau A2 → B1</div>
    </div>

    <button class="add-node-btn" id="btn-add-node" title="Ajouter un nœud personnalisé">
      <span class="plus">+</span>
      <span>Ajouter un nœud</span>
    </button>

    <div class="stage" id="stage">
      <div class="canvas" id="canvas">
        <svg class="edges" id="edges"></svg>
        <div id="levels-layer" class="level-bands"></div>
        <div id="nodes-layer"></div>
        <div id="sats-layer"></div>

    <div class="zoom-ctrl">

    <div class="mini-legend">
      <span>Généré par Panglot · <b>v0.5</b></span>
      <span>Utilisez la molette pour naviguer</span>
    </div>

    <!-- add-node form -->
    <div class="add-node-form" id="add-node-form">
      <button class="add-close" id="add-close">×</button>
      <h3>Ajouter un nœud</h3>
      <div class="hint">Crée une compétence personnalisée — par ex. "Vocabulaire cuisine" ou "Prépositions de temps".</div>
      <div class="field">
        <label>Titre</label>
        <input type="text" name="title" placeholder="ex. Prépositions de temps">
      </div>
      <div class="field">
        <label>Exemple / notation</label>
        <input type="text" name="native" placeholder="ex. am · um · in">
      </div>
      <div class="field-row">
        <div class="field">
          <label>Catégorie</label>
          <select name="category"></select>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Palier</label>
          <select name="palier"></select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="field">
        <label>Decks d'exercices (un par ligne)</label>
        <textarea name="decks" placeholder="Prépositions + accusatif
Prépositions + datif"></textarea>
      </div>

Options:
1. **No build step, plain globals** - current approach but split
2. **Vite + ES modules** - bundler
3. **Native ES modules** (type="module" in script tags) - no bundler, but real import/export. Works in modern browsers. The only catch is CORS - you need a server to serve them (which they already have with Actix). No CDN issue because they already use CDN scripts for i18next/supabase which are UMD. Could use importmap for those.


4. **Lit or similar web components** - component-based, no virtual DOM

6. **HTMX** - server-driven

For this project, the visualization-heavy frontend with canvas pan/zoom and SVG interactions needs to stay maintainable for both humans and AI agents. On security, I'm weighing the CDN compromise risk in the no-build approach against Vite's advantage of bundling dependencies locally, which eliminates that trust issue entirely—native ES modules would have the same CDN vulnerability as the current setup.

Looking at performance, the no-build approach means multiple HTTP requests but HTTP/2 handles small files fine, while Vite's single bundle with tree-shaking is better for production. For maintainability, native ES modules actually give me the best of both worlds—no build step required, but with real import/export syntax that avoids global state pollution and makes dependencies explicit, matching the code clarity I'd get from Vite.

The key insight is that CDN libraries need ESM builds available (which most modern ones do via services like jsDelivr), and I can wire them up with importmap to keep everything modular without any bundler. This is genuinely worth considering as an option.

Looking at the three approaches I could recommend: plain globals, native ES modules with importmap, or Vite. Native ES modules seems strongest here—it avoids global namespace pollution, keeps imports explicit and testable, and works fine with their local dev server. The main trade-off is importmap browser support, but that's been solid across all major browsers since 2024, so it's not really a concern anymore.

content.text:
Three real options, evaluated on your 3 metrics:

---

**Option A — Plain global split** (no build, no modules)
- Split app.js into ~10 files, shared via `PanglotState` global object
- Performance: same 10 HTTP/2 requests, negligible difference
- Security: CDN trust unchanged; globals reachable from console/extensions
- Maintainability: simpler but globals are implicit deps — easy to miss what a file needs

**Option B — Native ES modules** (no build, real import/export)
- Add `type="module"` to script tags + `<script type="importmap">` for CDN deps
- Performance: same requests, browser module cache is efficient, no bundler overhead
- Security: explicit dep graph per file; modules are strict mode by default; but CDN trust still exists
- Maintainability: best — each file declares its deps, no implicit globals, easy to understand in isolation. Claude can load one file, see exactly what it imports.

**Option C — Vite**
- Performance: single bundle, tree-shaken, fastest load
- Security: CDN deps bundled locally → eliminates CDN supply chain risk entirely
- Maintainability: same as Option B for code quality, but adds `npm run dev` to workflow and build artifacts to manage
- Cost: `npm install`, `vite.config.js`, Actix must serve `dist/` not `static/`

---

**My read:** Option B is the sweet spot. You get real `import/export` (best for agents — one file = one explicit dependency graph), zero new tooling, and it works directly with Actix static serving. Vite only pays off if you want to eliminate CDN risk or need HMR — neither seems blocking here.

# Frontend Refactor — Vite + ES Modules

## Context

`app/static/app.js` is a 969-line IIFE with ~14 distinct concerns mixed together. `index.html` embeds 420 lines of CSS inline. Every frontend task requires loading the entire monolith. Goal: split into focused modules (<200 lines each) so any task loads only the relevant file(s). Vite adds local dependency bundling (no CDN supply chain risk) and HMR.

---

## Target File Structure

```
app/static/
  src/
    state.js        (~25 lines)  — shared mutable UI state
    i18n.js         (~60 lines)  — i18next init, changeLocale, t(), uiLangs, flag SVGs
    layout.js       (~65 lines)  — CSS layout vars, computeLayout, nodeX/palierX, fitZone
    renderer.js     (~200 lines) — renderLevels, renderNodes, renderEdges, highlightChain
    macro.js        (~145 lines) — renderMacro, drillInto, exitMacroFilter
    panel.js        (~130 lines) — openPanel, closePanel, renderSatellites
    sidebar.js      (~50 lines)  — renderSidebar (stats, level bars, cat list, lang flag)
    viewport.js     (~80 lines)  — applyTransform, zoom, fitView, focusFrontier, wheel event
    menus.js        (~50 lines)  — buildLangMenu, buildUiLangMenu, toggleMenu, click-outside
    theme.js        (~60 lines)  — setTheme, View Transition animation
    tweaks.js       (~45 lines)  — applyTweak, DENSITY_VARS, tweak buttons + postMessage
    forms.js        (~55 lines)  — add-node form: populateAddSelects, submit handler
    frontier.js     (converted)  — re-export PanglotFrontier as named export
    api.js          (converted)  — re-export PanglotAPI as named exports
    store.js        (converted)  — re-export subscribe/loadLanguage/addNode/deleteCustomization
    auth.js         (converted)  — re-export PanglotAuth as named exports
    app.js          (~60 lines)  — entry point: init, PanglotStore.subscribe, startApp
    styles/
      main.css      (~420 lines) — extracted verbatim from index.html <style> block
  public/
    locales/        — moved from app/static/locales/ (Vite copies to dist/)
  index.html        (~80 lines)  — minimal shell, no inline CSS, single <script type="module">
  vite.config.js
  package.json
```

---

## State Module (`state.js`)

Central mutable object replacing scattered `let` vars in app.js:

```js
export const state = {
  tree: null,           // PanglotTree from store
  positions: {},        // { [nodeId]: { x, y } }
  prereqIndex: {},      // { [nodeId]: Set<nodeId> } reverse prereq map
  activeNodeId: null,
  viewMode: 'micro',    // 'micro' | 'macro'
  activeCatFilter: null,
  vscale: 1,
  firstRender: true,
};
```

---

## Dependency Graph (import direction)

```
app.js
  ├── state.js
  ├── i18n.js
  ├── store.js → api.js → frontier.js
  ├── auth.js
  ├── layout.js → state.js
  ├── renderer.js → state.js, layout.js, i18n.js
  ├── macro.js → state.js, layout.js, i18n.js
  ├── panel.js → state.js, layout.js, i18n.js
  ├── sidebar.js → state.js, i18n.js
  ├── viewport.js → state.js, layout.js
  ├── menus.js → state.js, i18n.js, store.js
  ├── theme.js
  ├── tweaks.js → layout.js, renderer.js, theme.js
  └── forms.js → state.js, i18n.js, store.js
```

No circular deps. Each leaf module can be read in isolation.

---

## Vite Config

```js
// vite.config.js
import { defineConfig } from 'vite';

export default defineConfig({
  root: 'app/static',
  publicDir: 'public',
  build: {
    outDir: '../dist/static',  // app/dist/static/
    emptyOutDir: true,
  },
  server: {
    port: 5173,
    proxy: {
      '/api': 'http://localhost:8080',
    },
  },
});
```

---

## Actix Change (app/src/main.rs)

Small: change static file path from `app/static/` to `app/dist/static/` in production, keep both with a feature flag or env var.

```rust
// dev: cargo run -p app (Actix at :8080, Vite at :5173)
// prod: Vite builds to app/dist/static/, Actix serves that
let static_dir = std::env::var("STATIC_DIR")
    .unwrap_or_else(|_| "app/dist/static".to_string());
```

---

## package.json (minimal)

```json
{
  "name": "panglot-frontend",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "vite build",
    "preview": "vite preview"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "vite": "^6.0.0"
  }
}
```

CDN deps (i18next, supabase) → move to npm dependencies, import in app.js:
```js
import i18next from 'i18next';
import i18nextHttpBackend from 'i18next-http-backend';
import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
```

---

## index.html After

```html
<!doctype html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
  <title>Panglot — Atlas de grammaire</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Instrument+Serif..." rel="stylesheet">
</head>
<body>
  <!-- DOM structure unchanged (~200 lines) -->
  <script type="module" src="/src/app.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```

---

## Implementation Order

1. `npm init` + install vite, i18next, supabase-js, i18next-http-backend
2. `vite.config.js`
3. Extract `src/styles/main.css` from index.html
4. Move `locales/` → `public/locales/`
5. Convert existing files to ESM: `frontier.js` → `api.js` → `store.js` → `auth.js`
6. Create `state.js`
7. Extract modules in dependency order (leaves first): `i18n.js`, `layout.js`, `theme.js`, `tweaks.js`, `viewport.js`, `forms.js`, `menus.js`, `sidebar.js`, `renderer.js`, `macro.js`, `panel.js`
8. Trim `app.js` to entry point (~60 lines)
9. Update `index.html` (remove inline CSS, remove CDN scripts, add module entry)
10. Add `STATIC_DIR` env var to Actix (serving `dist/static` in prod)
11. Test: `npm run dev` + `cargo run -p app` concurrently

---

## Verification

- `npm run dev` → Vite at :5173, proxies `/api` to Actix at :8080
- All tree features work: render, pan/zoom, panel, macro view, add node, theme toggle, i18n switch
- `npm run build` → `app/dist/static/` contains compiled bundle
- `STATIC_DIR=app/dist/static cargo run --release -p app` → full prod stack on :8080
- Each src/ file < 200 lines (check with `wc -l`)

# Frontend Refactor — Vite + ES Modules

## Context

`app/static/app.js` is a 969-line IIFE with ~14 distinct concerns mixed together. `index.html` embeds 420 lines of CSS inline. Every frontend task requires loading the entire monolith. Goal: split into focused modules (<200 lines each) so any task loads only the relevant file(s). Vite adds local dependency bundling (no CDN supply chain risk) and HMR.

---

## Target File Structure

```
app/static/
  src/
    state.js        (~25 lines)  — shared mutable UI state
    i18n.js         (~60 lines)  — i18next init, changeLocale, t(), uiLangs, flag SVGs
    layout.js       (~65 lines)  — CSS layout vars, computeLayout, nodeX/palierX, fitZone
    renderer.js     (~200 lines) — renderLevels, renderNodes, renderEdges, highlightChain
    macro.js        (~145 lines) — renderMacro, drillInto, exitMacroFilter
    panel.js        (~130 lines) — openPanel, closePanel, renderSatellites
    sidebar.js      (~50 lines)  — renderSidebar (stats, level bars, cat list, lang flag)
    viewport.js     (~80 lines)  — applyTransform, zoom, fitView, focusFrontier, wheel event
    menus.js        (~50 lines)  — buildLangMenu, buildUiLangMenu, toggleMenu, click-outside
    theme.js        (~60 lines)  — setTheme, View Transition animation
    tweaks.js       (~45 lines)  — applyTweak, DENSITY_VARS, tweak buttons + postMessage
    forms.js        (~55 lines)  — add-node form: populateAddSelects, submit handler
    frontier.js     (converted)  — re-export PanglotFrontier as named export
    api.js          (converted)  — re-export PanglotAPI as named exports
    store.js        (converted)  — re-export subscribe/loadLanguage/addNode/deleteCustomization
    auth.js         (converted)  — re-export PanglotAuth as named exports
    app.js          (~60 lines)  — entry point: init, PanglotStore.subscribe, startApp
    styles/
      main.css      (~420 lines) — extracted verbatim from index.html <style> block
  public/
    locales/        — moved from app/static/locales/ (Vite copies to dist/)
  index.html        (~80 lines)  — minimal shell, no inline CSS, single <script type="module">
  vite.config.js
  package.json
```

---

## State Module (`state.js`)

Central mutable object replacing scattered `let` vars in app.js:

```js
export const state = {
  tree: null,           // PanglotTree from store
  positions: {},        // { [nodeId]: { x, y } }
  prereqIndex: {},      // { [nodeId]: Set<nodeId> } reverse prereq map
  activeNodeId: null,
  viewMode: 'micro',    // 'micro' | 'macro'
  activeCatFilter: null,
  vscale: 1,
  firstRender: true,
};
```

---

## Dependency Graph (import direction)

```
app.js
  ├── state.js
  ├── i18n.js
  ├── store.js → api.js → frontier.js
  ├── auth.js
  ├── layout.js → state.js
  ├── renderer.js → state.js, layout.js, i18n.js
  ├── macro.js → state.js, layout.js, i18n.js
  ├── panel.js → state.js, layout.js, i18n.js
  ├── sidebar.js → state.js, i18n.js
  ├── viewport.js → state.js, layout.js
  ├── menus.js → state.js, i18n.js, store.js
  ├── theme.js
  ├── tweaks.js → layout.js, renderer.js, theme.js
  └── forms.js → state.js, i18n.js, store.js
```

No circular deps. Each leaf module can be read in isolation.

---

## Vite Config

```js
// vite.config.js
import { defineConfig } from 'vite';

export default defineConfig({
  root: 'app/static',
  publicDir: 'public',
  build: {
    outDir: '../dist/static',  // app/dist/static/
    emptyOutDir: true,
  },
  server: {
    port: 5173,
    proxy: {
      '/api': 'http://localhost:8080',
    },
  },
});
```

---

## Actix Change (app/src/main.rs)

Small: change static file path from `app/static/` to `app/dist/static/` in production, keep both with a feature flag or env var.

```rust
// dev: cargo run -p app (Actix at :8080, Vite at :5173)
// prod: Vite builds to app/dist/static/, Actix serves that
let static_dir = std::env::var("STATIC_DIR")
    .unwrap_or_else(|_| "app/dist/static".to_string());
```

---

## package.json (minimal)

```json
{
  "name": "panglot-frontend",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "vite build",
    "preview": "vite preview"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "vite": "^6.0.0"
  }
}
```

CDN deps (i18next, supabase) → move to npm dependencies, import in app.js:
```js
import i18next from 'i18next';
import i18nextHttpBackend from 'i18next-http-backend';
import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
```

---

## index.html After

```html
<!doctype html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
  <title>Panglot — Atlas de grammaire</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Instrument+Serif..." rel="stylesheet">
</head>
<body>
  <!-- DOM structure unchanged (~200 lines) -->
  <script type="module" src="/src/app.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```

---

## Implementation Order

1. `npm init` + install vite, i18next, supabase-js, i18next-http-backend
2. `vite.config.js`
3. Extract `src/styles/main.css` from index.html
4. Move `locales/` → `public/locales/`
5. Convert existing files to ESM: `frontier.js` → `api.js` → `store.js` → `auth.js`
6. Create `state.js`
7. Extract modules in dependency order (leaves first): `i18n.js`, `layout.js`, `theme.js`, `tweaks.js`, `viewport.js`, `forms.js`, `menus.js`, `sidebar.js`, `renderer.js`, `macro.js`, `panel.js`
8. Trim `app.js` to entry point (~60 lines)
9. Update `index.html` (remove inline CSS, remove CDN scripts, add module entry)
10. Add `STATIC_DIR` env var to Actix (serving `dist/static` in prod)
11. Test: `npm run dev` + `cargo run -p app` concurrently

---

## Verification

- `npm run dev` → Vite at :5173, proxies `/api` to Actix at :8080
- All tree features work: render, pan/zoom, panel, macro view, add node, theme toggle, i18n switch
- `npm run build` → `app/dist/static/` contains compiled bundle
- `STATIC_DIR=app/dist/static cargo run --release -p app` → full prod stack on :8080
- Each src/ file < 200 lines (check with `wc -l`)

# Panglot

LLM-powered language learning engine. Generates exercises (Anki flashcards), extracts morphological features for any language.

## Philosophy

### Radical linguistic agnosticism
Each language defines what *it* needs — not what all languages share. No universal morphological schema. Polish: 7 cases, verbal aspect. Japanese: particles, agglutination, 3 scripts. Arabic: triliteral roots, wazn patterns. Mandarin: classifiers, aspect particles. 4 languages = 4 distinct type systems.

### No Indo-European/Western bias
Code acknowledges each language's specifics in LLM directives: Mandarin topic-prominent, Arabic reverse gender agreement for numbers 3-10, Japanese explicit de-agglutination. Generation/extraction directives linguistically informed, not modeled after English grammar.

### Scripts and pedagogical transliterations
Scripts validated via ISO 15924, first-class citizens. Japanese: 3 scripts (Hani, Hira, Kana). `transliteration` field in `GenerationRequest` designed for pedagogical systems (pinyin, furigana, etc.). System integrates transliterations needed for learning.

### Linguistics-driven pedagogy
Skill trees reflect how linguists teach each language: Polish starts with cases, Japanese with writing systems, Mandarin with tones/pronunciation, Arabic with alphabet/diacritics. Nodes carry language-specific `node_instructions` for LLM.

### Universal coverage
Supports any human language, including dialects. `codegen` tool generates skeletons, build system auto-detects new languages. Adding language = 1 Rust file + 1 YAML.

### Open-core model
Engine (core, engine, langs, anki_bridge, lc_macro, codegen) public; hosted product layer (app, frontend, real prompts, internal docs) private. `scripts/sync_to_public.sh` uses `git-filter-repo` to produce filtered clone pushed to `panglot-public`. **Private**: production prompts (`prompts/*.yaml`), some language implementations (cmn, jpn), frontend (`app/static/`), internal docs, secrets, sync script. **Public**: full engine, core traits, macros, Anki bridge, Polish + Arabic as reference languages with skill trees, example prompts. `README_public.md` renamed to `README.md` in public repo. New features: infrastructure-level code (observability, traits, pipeline) stays public; business logic (billing, auth, rate limiting) feature-gated or private.

## Software values

- **Type safety as guarantee** — Associated types on `Language` (`Morphology`, `ExtraFields`), bounded types in `validated.rs` (impossible to construct invalid), exhaustive `AnyCard` via macro, `#[derive(MorphologyInfo)]` enforces `lemma` on every morphological enum variant.
- **Compile-time over runtime** — `langs/build.rs` generates registry at build time, `dispatch_iso!` resolves languages at compilation, `include_dir!` embeds trees, `static_assertions` verifies Send+Sync. Build fails if language missing tree YAML.
- **Modularity through traits** — `Language`, `CardModel`, `LlmClient`, `StorageProvider`, `SrsAlgorithm`, `EarlyPostProcessor`, `LatePostProcessor`, `CardValidator`. Each interface minimal, focused. Pipeline accepts injected dependencies, no direct coupling.
- **LLM as untrusted source** — Every LLM response validated against JSON schema, parsed into strongly-typed Rust structs, re-validated by CardValidators. Auto-retry with feedback on validation failure.
- **Defensive by default** — Explicit HTML sanitization (char by char in `sanitize.rs`), input validation at type construction, no framework magic.
- **Explicit concurrency** — Semaphores passed as parameters (not global), `tokio::sync::RwLock` for LLM client, `parking_lot::RwLock` for short synchronous access.
- **Separation of concerns** — CardMetadata (linguistic analysis) != CardModel (HTML rendering) != Storage (persistence) != SRS (scheduling). Each component has clear boundary.
- **__PRIMORDIAL :__ No NIH (Not Invented Here)** — Prefer established ecosystem solutions. If well-maintained crate or industry standard exists, discuss it rather than building bespoke.

## Architecture

### Workspace (7 crates)

- **core/** (lc_core) — Core traits (`Language`, `CardModel`, `MorphologyInfo`), domain types (`CardMetadata`, `ExtractedFeature`, `LexiconEntry`), SQLite DB layer (sqlx), SRS algorithms (SM-2, FSRS-4.5/5/6, Leitner), skill trees, input validation (`validated.rs`), HTML sanitization
- **engine/** — Full LLM pipeline: exercise generation (`GeneratorContext`), morphological feature extraction (`FeatureExtractorContext`), post-processing (IPA/TTS), multi-provider LLM client (Google/Anthropic/OpenAI/custom), YAML prompts with `{placeholder}` variables
- **langs/** — Per-language implementations. Each language: unit struct implementing `Language` with own `Morphology` enum (POS-tagged via `#[serde(tag = "pos")]`). Build script (`build.rs`) auto-discovers files, generates `lang_registry.rs` with `dispatch_iso!` and `ALL_ISO_CODES`
- **anki_bridge/** — `.apkg` export (DeckBuilder, MultiDeckBuilder), AnkiConnect provider for local Anki sync
- **app/** (bin: panglot) — Actix-web server, REST API, Supabase JWT auth, vanilla JS SPA frontend in `app/static/`
- **lc_macro/** — Procedural macros: `#[derive(ToFields)]` (struct -> HashMap for Anki), `#[derive(MorphologyInfo)]` (enforces `lemma`, generates `.lemma()` and `.pos_label()`)
- **codegen/** (bin: lc-codegen) — LLM-assisted code generation for new languages (Rust skeleton + skill tree YAML)

### Generation pipeline

1. **Prompt** — `GeneratorContext` assembles language directives, skill node instructions, user profile, card model JSON schema
2. **LLM Call 1** — Content generation (temperature 0.8, structured output via JSON schema)
3. **Parse + Validation** — `AnyCard::parse<L>()` into typed structs, then `CardValidator::validate()`. On failure -> retry with feedback
4. **In parallel**:
   - LLM Call 2 — Morphological feature extraction (temperature 0.0) -> `FeatureExtractionResponse<M>` with `target_features`, `context_features`, `pedagogical_explanation`
   - Early post-processing — IPA (epitran) + TTS (edge-tts) via Python sidecar
5. **Late post-processing** — Final `CardMetadata<M>` assembly

### Python sidecar
`scripts/sidecar.py` — Long-lived subprocess, JSON-line protocol. Commands: `ipa` (transcription via epitran), `tts` (audio via edge-tts), `quit`. Called from `engine/src/python_sidecar.rs`.

### Frontend
Vanilla JS SPA in `app/static/` (no framework). 14 JS modules, 7 CSS stylesheets. Pages: generator, skill tree, decks, study (SRS), lexicon, profile.

## Key patterns

- **`dispatch_iso!`** — Build-generated macro. Resolves ISO code (`"pol"`, `"jpn"`, etc.) to concrete `Language` type at compile time. Used in `app/src/main.rs` to instantiate pipelines.
- **`define_card_models!`** — Single macro (`engine/src/card_models.rs`) generates `CardModelId` enum, `AnyCard` enum, JSON parsing, schema generation, `speakable_text()`, `front_html()`/`back_html()`.
- **`#[derive(MorphologyInfo)]`** — Every morphological enum variant MUST have `lemma: String` as first field. Macro generates `.lemma()` and `.pos_label()`.
- **`#[derive(ToFields)]`** — Converts struct into `HashMap<String, String>` for Anki export. Supports `#[serde(flatten)]` for nested structs.
- **Skill tree overlay** — Non-destructive per-user customization (add/hide/edit nodes) on top of shared base tree.
- **`DynPipeline`** — Type-erasure of generic `Pipeline<L>` for API layer. HTTP handlers work with `Box<dyn DynPipeline>`, no generics leak out.
- **`OnceLock`** — Lazy caching of base trees, avoids re-parsing YAML per request.

## Commands

```bash
cargo build --release            # Optimized build
cargo run -p app                 # Dev server (http://127.0.0.1:8080)
cargo run --release -p app       # Release server
cargo test --workspace           # All tests
cargo clippy --workspace         # Lint
cargo run -p codegen -- --iso <code>  # Generate skeleton for new language
```

## Adding a language

1. Create `langs/src/<code>.rs` — Unit struct implementing `Language`. Define `Morphology` enum with `#[derive(MorphologyInfo)]` and `#[serde(tag = "pos")]` (every variant MUST have `lemma: String`). Define `ExtraFields` if needed (e.g., `context_disambiguation` for Japanese). Specify supported scripts, extraction/generation directives, IPA/TTS strategies.
2. Create `core/trees/<iso>_tree.yaml` — Skill tree reflecting linguistic pedagogy for that language. Each node carries `node_instructions` to guide LLM.
3. `cargo build` — Build script auto-discovers file, verifies tree YAML, generates registry. Done.

## Configuration

- **`config.yml`** — LLM provider (`google`/`anthropic`/`openai`/`custom`), model, host/port, concurrency (`max_llm_calls`, `max_post_process`), Supabase auth, paths
- **`.env`** — `GOOGLE_API_KEY`, `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, `SUPABASE_URL`, `SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`, `SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET`
- **`prompts/*.yaml`** — Prompt templates with `{placeholder}` variables: `generator.yaml` (exercise generation), `extractor.yaml` (morphological extraction), `common.yaml`, `user.yaml`

```
app/static/
  src/
    utils.js       — esc(), isCustom()
    state.js       — shared mutable UI state (tree, positions, activeNodeId, viewMode, …)
    frontier.js    — frontier level algorithms (median_filtered, etc.)
    api.js         — HTTP client (fetchTree, generateForNode, mutations)
    store.js       — pub/sub state store (subscribe, loadLanguage, addNode, …)
    auth.js        — Supabase auth (init, login, logout)
    i18n.js        — i18next init, changeLocale, t(), uiLangs, flag SVGs
    layout.js      — CSS layout vars, computeLayout, nodeX/palierX, fitZone, buildPrereqIndex
    renderer.js    — renderLevels, renderNodes, renderEdges, highlightChain
    macro.js       — renderMacro, drillInto, exitMacroFilter
    panel.js       — openPanel, closePanel, renderSatellites
    sidebar.js     — renderSidebar (stats, level bars, cat list, lang flag)
    viewport.js    — applyTransform, zoom, fitView, focusFrontier, wheel event
    menus.js       — buildLangMenu, buildUiLangMenu, toggleMenu
    theme.js       — setTheme, View Transition animation
    tweaks.js      — applyTweak, DENSITY_VARS, tweak buttons + postMessage
    forms.js       — add-node form (populateAddSelects, submit)
    app.js         — entry point: store subscription + startApp init
    styles/
      main.css     — all CSS (extracted from old inline <style> block)
  public/
    locales/       — i18n JSON files (fr/en/de), served as static assets by Vite
  index.html       — minimal shell (~80 lines), no inline CSS, single <script type="module">
  vite.config.js
  package.json
```

**Dependency graph (import direction):**

app.js → state, i18n, store, auth, layout, renderer, macro, panel, sidebar, viewport, menus, theme, tweaks, forms

store.js     → api
api.js       → frontier
auth.js      → api  (+ @supabase/supabase-js)
i18n.js      → i18next, i18next-http-backend
```
No circular deps. Each leaf module is self-contained and readable in isolation.

# Panglot

LLM-powered language learning engine. Generates exercises (Anki flashcards), extracts morphological features for any language.

## Philosophy

### Radical linguistic agnosticism
Each language defines what *it* needs — not what all languages share. No universal morphological schema. Polish: 7 cases, verbal aspect. Japanese: particles, agglutination, 3 scripts. Arabic: triliteral roots, wazn patterns. Mandarin: classifiers, aspect particles. 4 languages = 4 distinct type systems.

### No Indo-European/Western bias
Code acknowledges each language's specifics in LLM directives: Mandarin topic-prominent, Arabic reverse gender agreement for numbers 3-10, Japanese explicit de-agglutination. Generation/extraction directives linguistically informed, not modeled after English grammar.

### Scripts and pedagogical transliterations
Scripts validated via ISO 15924, first-class citizens. Japanese: 3 scripts (Hani, Hira, Kana). `transliteration` field in `GenerationRequest` designed for pedagogical systems (pinyin, furigana, etc.). System integrates transliterations needed for learning.

### Linguistics-driven pedagogy
Skill trees reflect how linguists teach each language: Polish starts with cases, Japanese with writing systems, Mandarin with tones/pronunciation, Arabic with alphabet/diacritics. Nodes carry language-specific `node_instructions` for LLM.

### Universal coverage
Supports any human language, including dialects. `codegen` tool generates skeletons, build system auto-detects new languages. Adding language = 1 Rust file + 1 YAML.

### Open-core model
Engine (core, engine, langs, anki_bridge, lc_macro, codegen) public; hosted product layer (app, frontend, real prompts, internal docs) private. `scripts/sync_to_public.sh` uses `git-filter-repo` to produce filtered clone pushed to `panglot-public`. **Private**: production prompts (`prompts/*.yaml`), some language implementations (cmn, jpn), frontend (`app/static/`), internal docs, secrets, sync script. **Public**: full engine, core traits, macros, Anki bridge, Polish + Arabic as reference languages with skill trees, example prompts. `README_public.md` renamed to `README.md` in public repo. New features: infrastructure-level code (observability, traits, pipeline) stays public; business logic (billing, auth, rate limiting) feature-gated or private.

## Software values

- **Type safety as guarantee** — Associated types on `Language` (`Morphology`, `ExtraFields`), bounded types in `validated.rs` (impossible to construct invalid), exhaustive `AnyCard` via macro, `#[derive(MorphologyInfo)]` enforces `lemma` on every morphological enum variant.
- **Compile-time over runtime** — `langs/build.rs` generates registry at build time, `dispatch_iso!` resolves languages at compilation, `include_dir!` embeds trees, `static_assertions` verifies Send+Sync. Build fails if language missing tree YAML.
- **Modularity through traits** — `Language`, `CardModel`, `LlmClient`, `StorageProvider`, `SrsAlgorithm`, `EarlyPostProcessor`, `LatePostProcessor`, `CardValidator`. Each interface minimal, focused. Pipeline accepts injected dependencies, no direct coupling.
- **LLM as untrusted source** — Every LLM response validated against JSON schema, parsed into strongly-typed Rust structs, re-validated by CardValidators. Auto-retry with feedback on validation failure.
- **Defensive by default** — Explicit HTML sanitization (char by char in `sanitize.rs`), input validation at type construction, no framework magic.
- **Explicit concurrency** — Semaphores passed as parameters (not global), `tokio::sync::RwLock` for LLM client, `parking_lot::RwLock` for short synchronous access.
- **Separation of concerns** — CardMetadata (linguistic analysis) != CardModel (HTML rendering) != Storage (persistence) != SRS (scheduling). Each component has clear boundary.
- **__PRIMORDIAL :__ No NIH (Not Invented Here)** — Prefer established ecosystem solutions. If well-maintained crate or industry standard exists, discuss it rather than building bespoke.

## Architecture

### Workspace (7 crates)

- **core/** (lc_core) — Core traits (`Language`, `CardModel`, `MorphologyInfo`), domain types (`CardMetadata`, `ExtractedFeature`, `LexiconEntry`), SQLite DB layer (sqlx), SRS algorithms (SM-2, FSRS-4.5/5/6, Leitner), skill trees, input validation (`validated.rs`), HTML sanitization
- **engine/** — Full LLM pipeline: exercise generation (`GeneratorContext`), morphological feature extraction (`FeatureExtractorContext`), post-processing (IPA/TTS), multi-provider LLM client (Google/Anthropic/OpenAI/custom), YAML prompts with `{placeholder}` variables
- **langs/** — Per-language implementations. Each language: unit struct implementing `Language` with own `Morphology` enum (POS-tagged via `#[serde(tag = "pos")]`). Build script (`build.rs`) auto-discovers files, generates `lang_registry.rs` with `dispatch_iso!` and `ALL_ISO_CODES`
- **anki_bridge/** — `.apkg` export (DeckBuilder, MultiDeckBuilder), AnkiConnect provider for local Anki sync
- **app/** (bin: panglot) — Actix-web server, REST API, Supabase JWT auth, vanilla JS SPA frontend in `app/static/`
- **lc_macro/** — Procedural macros: `#[derive(ToFields)]` (struct -> HashMap for Anki), `#[derive(MorphologyInfo)]` (enforces `lemma`, generates `.lemma()` and `.pos_label()`)
- **codegen/** (bin: lc-codegen) — LLM-assisted code generation for new languages (Rust skeleton + skill tree YAML)

### Generation pipeline

1. **Prompt** — `GeneratorContext` assembles language directives, skill node instructions, user profile, card model JSON schema
2. **LLM Call 1** — Content generation (temperature 0.8, structured output via JSON schema)
3. **Parse + Validation** — `AnyCard::parse<L>()` into typed structs, then `CardValidator::validate()`. On failure -> retry with feedback
4. **In parallel**:
   - LLM Call 2 — Morphological feature extraction (temperature 0.0) -> `FeatureExtractionResponse<M>` with `target_features`, `context_features`, `pedagogical_explanation`
   - Early post-processing — IPA (epitran) + TTS (edge-tts) via Python sidecar
5. **Late post-processing** — Final `CardMetadata<M>` assembly

### Python sidecar
`scripts/sidecar.py` — Long-lived subprocess, JSON-line protocol. Commands: `ipa` (transcription via epitran), `tts` (audio via edge-tts), `quit`. Called from `engine/src/python_sidecar.rs`.

### Frontend
Vanilla JS SPA in `app/static/` (no framework). 14 JS modules, 7 CSS stylesheets. Pages: generator, skill tree, decks, study (SRS), lexicon, profile.

## Key patterns

- **`dispatch_iso!`** — Build-generated macro. Resolves ISO code (`"pol"`, `"jpn"`, etc.) to concrete `Language` type at compile time. Used in `app/src/main.rs` to instantiate pipelines.
- **`define_card_models!`** — Single macro (`engine/src/card_models.rs`) generates `CardModelId` enum, `AnyCard` enum, JSON parsing, schema generation, `speakable_text()`, `front_html()`/`back_html()`.
- **`#[derive(MorphologyInfo)]`** — Every morphological enum variant MUST have `lemma: String` as first field. Macro generates `.lemma()` and `.pos_label()`.
- **`#[derive(ToFields)]`** — Converts struct into `HashMap<String, String>` for Anki export. Supports `#[serde(flatten)]` for nested structs.
- **Skill tree overlay** — Non-destructive per-user customization (add/hide/edit nodes) on top of shared base tree.
- **`DynPipeline`** — Type-erasure of generic `Pipeline<L>` for API layer. HTTP handlers work with `Box<dyn DynPipeline>`, no generics leak out.
- **`OnceLock`** — Lazy caching of base trees, avoids re-parsing YAML per request.

## Commands

```bash
cargo build --release            # Optimized build
cargo run -p app                 # Dev server (http://127.0.0.1:8080)
cargo run --release -p app       # Release server
cargo test --workspace           # All tests
cargo clippy --workspace         # Lint
cargo run -p codegen -- --iso <code>  # Generate skeleton for new language
```

## Adding a language

1. Create `langs/src/<code>.rs` — Unit struct implementing `Language`. Define `Morphology` enum with `#[derive(MorphologyInfo)]` and `#[serde(tag = "pos")]` (every variant MUST have `lemma: String`). Define `ExtraFields` if needed (e.g., `context_disambiguation` for Japanese). Specify supported scripts, extraction/generation directives, IPA/TTS strategies.
2. Create `core/trees/<iso>_tree.yaml` — Skill tree reflecting linguistic pedagogy for that language. Each node carries `node_instructions` to guide LLM.
3. `cargo build` — Build script auto-discovers file, verifies tree YAML, generates registry. Done.

## Configuration

- **`config.yml`** — LLM provider (`google`/`anthropic`/`openai`/`custom`), model, host/port, concurrency (`max_llm_calls`, `max_post_process`), Supabase auth, paths
- **`.env`** — `GOOGLE_API_KEY`, `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, `SUPABASE_URL`, `SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`, `SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET`
- **`prompts/*.yaml`** — Prompt templates with `{placeholder}` variables: `generator.yaml` (exercise generation), `extractor.yaml` (morphological extraction), `common.yaml`, `user.yaml`

* { box-sizing: border-box; }
html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; height: 100%; }

.app { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 240px 1fr; grid-template-rows: 56px 1fr; height: 100vh; position: relative; z-index: 2; }

.brand-tag { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-faded); border-left: 1px solid var(--rule); padding-left: 12px; }
.topnav { display: flex; gap: 2px; }
.topnav a { display: block; padding: 8px 14px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--ink-soft); text-decoration: none; border-radius: 3px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

.streak b { color: var(--accent-ink); font-weight: 600; }

.lang-picker, .ui-lang-picker { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 5px 10px 5px 8px; border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); font-size: 12px; color: var(--ink); background: transparent; cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-ui); }
.lang-picker:hover, .ui-lang-picker:hover { background: var(--paper-2); }
.flag { width: 18px; height: 13px; border-radius: 2px; overflow:hidden; display:inline-block; vertical-align: middle; border: 1px solid var(--rule); }
.icon-btn { width: 32px; height: 32px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid var(--rule); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); background: transparent; color: var(--ink-soft); cursor: pointer; }
.icon-btn:hover { color: var(--ink); background: var(--paper-2); }

.zl-txt b { color: var(--ink); font-weight: 500; }

.cat-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }

.canvas-wrap { position: relative; overflow: auto; background: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 0%, oklch(from var(--paper) calc(l + 0.015) c h) 0%, var(--paper) 60%); }

   without ever overlapping the title or meta. A soft fade-out keeps it feeling paper-y. */
.canvas-chrome { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 110px; z-index: 3; pointer-events: none;

.canvas-head { position: absolute; top: 20px; left: 28px; z-index: 4; pointer-events: none; }

.level-band .sub-tick:first-of-type { border-left: none; }

/* frontier line — user's current level indicator */
.frontier-line { position: absolute; top: 140px; bottom: 0; width: 0; z-index: 2; border-left: 1.5px solid var(--accent); opacity: .55; pointer-events: none; }
.frontier-line::before { content:''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: -4px; width: 8px; height: 8px; background: var(--accent); border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(from var(--accent) l c h / .2); }
.frontier-label { position: absolute; top: -4px; left: 14px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent-ink); display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; white-space: nowrap; background: var(--paper); padding: 2px 6px; border: 1px solid oklch(from var(--accent) l c h / .3); border-radius: 3px; }
.frontier-label .frontier-dot { width: 5px; height: 5px; background: var(--accent); border-radius: 50%; }

.edges { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; overflow: visible; }
